name_en: 🆕 Chip Version M12207 This envelope-style wallet is crafted from elegant Monogram canvas with a cleverly designed interior featuring various pockets and credit card slots. 19.0 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W) - 19 x 9.5 x 1 cm - 16 credit card slots, 2 large compartments for bills, zip coin pocket - Calfskin lining - Shiny gold metal hardware
